implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Revised to align efficiency and sustainability objectives for bookkeeping system
The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): The system must ensure double-entry bookkeeping principles are followed and maintain an audit trail of all transactions
The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): The system must support multiple accounts and categories
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
The system shall ensure efficiency (latency optimization): Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
